Comment: As I step into the production side of the entertainment industry, this show provides me with an understanding of how a movie is made. What is the job of a producer? How do they work with the writer, director, the actors, and actresses, the executives of the studio, and the boss of the company? For the Godfather movie, the producer also needed to deal with the mob. A film can never be completed without the hard work and perseverance of a passionate team. This is my favorite show. I love every character in it. This is also my second time watching it.
a great story about making the movie The Godfather
